title: erysimum capitatum var. angustatum
intro: Erysimum capitatum var. angustatum, also known as narrow-leaved wallflower, is a perennial plant species native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and narrow leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Consuming the plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, and it is also used to treat skin conditions like wounds and eczema. Erysimum capitatum var. angustatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
